user.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look here: {docs_url} - Click this link [Microsoft Login]({login_url}) to retrieve the OAuth response URL.

reauth_confirm.description: Your Microsoft Family Safety authentication has expired. Click this link [Microsoft Login]({login_url}) to retrieve a new OAuth response URL.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the server.

applications.description: Create or delete application specific entities

accounts.description: Allows you to collect all accounts (default) or optionally provide a list of accounts to pull entities for

invalid_request_id.message: The provided request ID is not valid or is no longer pending.

application_not_found.message: Application {name} was not found on this account.

block_app.name: Block Application
block_app.description: Block an application from running for the given Microsoft account.

name.name: Application name
name.description: The name of the application to block (you can find this in the screen time sensor).

unblock_app.name: Unblock Application
unblock_app.description: Allow an application to run for the given Microsoft account.

name.name: Application name
name.description: The name of the application to block (you can find this in the screen time sensor).

request_id.name: Request ID
request_id.description: The ID of the request to deny, found as an attribute under the pending requests sensor (key 'id').

request_id.name: Request ID
request_id.description: The ID of the request to approve, found as an attribute under the pending requests sensor (key 'id').

extension_time.name: Extension Time
extension_time.description: The number of TBC to grant as an extension
